description_long: This is a sleek, modern sailing yacht with a streamlined white hull and two prominent masts supporting large, cream-colored sails. The deck features a recessed cockpit area with seating and a steering wheel, surrounded by a low guardrail. The hull is smooth and gently curved, with a pointed bow and a slightly raised stern. The deck layout is open, with minimal superstructure and no visible cabin above deck, emphasizing a sporty and agile design. The rigging and sail arrangement suggest a focus on performance and maneuverability. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for recreational sailing.
description: A modern white sailing yacht with two large sails, a streamlined hull, and an open deck with a recessed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the yacht, both sails, the cockpit, and the smooth, white hull.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, the forward sail, and the narrow profile of the hull.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hull's curvature, both sails, and the open cockpit area.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stern, the cockpit layout, and the alignment of the masts and sails.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a pointed bow and gently curved sides, finished in white with a smooth, unmarked surface. The hull features a single keel and a slightly raised stern, with no visible chines or additional markings.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level open deck with a recessed cockpit located centrally, surrounded by a low guardrail. The cockpit includes seating and a steering wheel, with clear walkways along the sides and minimal deck equipment visible.
attribute_cabin_structure: No raised cabin structure is visible above deck; the yacht features an open cockpit design with no apparent windows or doors, suggesting either a flush deck or a very low-profile cabin below deck level.
